hero.subtitle: Alternative Asset Class
hero.title: Accelerate Your Capital
hero.description: Capitalize on the highly fragmented exotic auto market. Discover high-turnover, high-margin opportunities curated for the institutional investor.

features.title: Curated Acquisitions
features.description: We source only the most sought-after marques — Porsche, Ferrari, Lamborghini, McLaren — through proprietary off-market deal flow.

features.title: In-House Excellence
features.description: Our master technicians execute institutional-grade reconditioning, eliminating third-party margins and maximizing asset value.

features.title: Structured Risk Control
features.description: Every vehicle is evaluated through strict buy-box discipline, documentation checks, and exit-price benchmarking before capital is deployed.

features.title: Margin Optimization
features.description: We combine pricing intelligence, service oversight, and timing discipline to improve realized spreads across each asset rotation.

features.title: Global Distribution
features.description: An established network of collectors, dealerships, and auction houses ensures rapid, premium-priced asset deployment.

about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.title: The Intersection of Passion & Performance.
about.description: Royal Drive is a premier exotic and luxury auto dealership with a vertically integrated investment thesis. We acquire, recondition, and deploy high-value vehicles through an elite global network — turning physical assets into financial instruments.

whyInvest.subtitle: Why Invest?
whyInvest.title: A Premium Opportunity In A High-Growth Market.
whyInvest.description: Investing in Royal Drive offers a high-impact opportunity to capitalize on India’s booming pre-owned luxury car market. Our business model is built on a foundation of uncompromising trust and transparency, supported by a diversified ecosystem spanning luxury and budget vehicles, professional detailing services, and lifestyle ventures like RD Cafe. Fully government-authorized and legally compliant, Royal Drive combines first-mover advantage with a scalable, reputation-driven strategy, making it a compelling destination for serious investors.

pillars.title: Algorithmic Sourcing.
pillars.description: Proprietary data models identify distressed, unlisted, and dramatically underpriced exotic inventory globally before they hit retail markets.

pillars.title: Value-Add Reconditioning.
pillars.description: In-house master technicians execute rapid, institutional-grade reconditioning to eradicate deferred maintenance and force premium appreciation.

pillars.title: High-Velocity Retail.
pillars.description: Assets are deployed into an elite, established network of global collectors and dealerships, ensuring capital rotation in under 30 days.

moatItems.title: In-House Restorations
moatItems.description: Controlling all service internally eliminates 3rd-party margins, capturing maximum spread before resale.

moatItems.title: Data Arbitrage
moatItems.description: Proprietary pricing algorithms detect macroeconomic fluctuations ahead of the curve.

moatItems.title: Tangible Asset Collateral
moatItems.description: Every dollar deployed is backed by physical, highly sought-after exotic vehicles with intrinsic global demand.

items.question: How often are distributions paid?
items.answer: Distributions from operational cash flow are typically remitted on a quarterly basis, accompanied by a comprehensive K-1 and performance report on your capital's rotation.

items.question: What is the target hold period?
items.answer: While the underlying assets rotate every 28 days on average, capital commitments are structured on open-ended or 3-year term structures depending on the specific vehicle selected.

items.question: Are these investments strictly for accredited investors?
items.answer: Yes. Under current SEC regulations (Regulation D, Rule 506), participation in Royal Drive offerings requires verifying accredited investor or qualified purchaser status.

items.question: What asset classes does Royal Drive focus on?
items.answer: We specialize exclusively in pre-owned exotic and luxury automobiles from marques such as Porsche, Ferrari, Lamborghini, McLaren, Aston Martin, and Bentley — vehicles with proven demand and collector appreciation.
